title: Spawners+
description: Allow players to craft Mob Spawners in Survival. Inspired by the craftable Mob Spawners in Origin Realms.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c554681f76a663740c82fbd4d3c72afb8451b90.png)

This mod adds:

- Soul Stealing Enchantment - A weapon enchantment that allows mob souls to drop on kill.
- Spawner Fragments - Dropped by breaking Mob Spawners, increased drops with Fortune.
- Inactive Spawner - Crafted with 8 Spawner Fragments, use a Mob Soul on it to activate.
- Spawner Silencer - Crafted with 8 Spawner Fragments and a Totem, holding it stops spawners from activating.

Souls for:
- Zombies
- Skeletons
- Spiders
- Cave Spiders
- Blazes
- Magma Cubes
- Strays
- Wither Skeletons
- Husks
- Drowned
- Slimes
- Creepers
